symptoms.symptom_name: Rapid palpitations with an arrhythmic (palpitation-first) prodrome

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A palpitation-first prodrome points to a primary arrhythmia rather than a reflex faint.
Reflex syncope typically has an autonomic prodrome (nausea, warmth, pallor), not a sudden racing heart first.

symptoms.symptom_name: Exertional near-syncope (presyncope brought on by running)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Syncope during/after exertion is a cardinal red flag for structural/inherited heart disease and malignant arrhythmia.
Exertional (rather than post-exertional or situational) syncope is atypical for a benign vasovagal faint.

symptoms.symptom_name: Family history of premature sudden unexplained cardiac death

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Premature SCD in a relative markedly raises pre-test probability of a heritable arrhythmic condition and triggers family screening.

symptoms.symptom_name: Two-month progressive worsening of exertional arrhythmic symptoms

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An escalating exertional pattern is consistent with an evolving arrhythmic substrate and rising risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Frequent premature ventricular contractions (palpable at rest)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Frequent ventricular ectopy reflects the arrhythmogenic substrate; the clinician-palpated frequency is a sealed examination finding, though the patient may self-report skipped beats.

symptoms.symptom_name: Parasternal right ventricular heave on palpation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A parasternal heave suggests right ventricular enlargement/overload — a clinician palpation finding, not obtainable via telehealth.
Mildly raised JVP hints at early right-heart involvement; requires clinician assessment and cannot be judged remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Epsilon waves / repolarisation abnormality on 12-lead ECG

investigation_details.expected_result: Epsilon waves and/or T-wave inversion V1–V3 with ventricular ectopy (presumed, pending test in the source)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The single most important first-line test; not obtaining it leaves a lethal arrhythmic substrate undetected.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Epsilon waves are a hallmark depolarisation abnormality in ARVC; a confirmatory investigation, never available in a telehealth chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Right ventricular fibrofatty replacement on cardiac MRI

investigation_details.expected_result: RV dilatation/dysfunction with fibrofatty myocardial replacement (pending MRI in the source)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Definitive structural confirmation of ARVC; deferred to specialist work-up, impossible via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fibrofatty RV replacement with RV dysfunction is a defining structural criterion for ARVC.

symptoms.symptom_name: No ejection systolic murmur radiating to carotids/axilla

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of an outflow murmur makes obstructive HCM less likely, but HCM remains on the do-not-miss list; an auscultation finding unavailable in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Haemodynamically stable and asymptomatic at rest (normal resting observations)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal resting status is expected between arrhythmic episodes and must NOT be used to exclude the diagnosis or de-escalate.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Exertional arrhythmic syncope with heritable SCD risk
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Inherited cardiomyopathy / exertional ventricular arrhythmia (ARVC leading)
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together, an exertional arrhythmic prodrome, exertional near-syncope, and a family history of premature sudden death form a high-probability inherited-cardiomyopathy red-flag cluster that mandates urgent cardiac assessment and exercise restriction.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line, fastest test to detect epsilon waves, repolarisation change and ventricular ectopy; the source explicitly arranges an urgent ECG.
Quantifies ventricular arrhythmia burden and captures exertional events over 24–48h+.
Confirms RV structural involvement (dilatation/dysfunction, fibrofatty replacement) — specialist-arranged.
Assesses RV/LV structure and function and helps weigh HCM versus ARVC.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Cardiology referral for genetic testing and first-degree family screening
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Given premature SCD in a relative, heritable-condition confirmation and cascade screening are indicated.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine broad blood panel as a diagnostic test for the syncope
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Bloods do not diagnose an inherited arrhythmic cardiomyopathy and must not substitute for ECG/imaging/specialist referral.
